findingDetails: H1: D3 height arithmetic inconsistency (108pt stated vs. 140pt computed)
H2: D4 async-to-sync caller cascade underspecified
H3: D3 does not account for conditional sonnet row (2 vs. 3 rows)
M1: D4 must retain missingOAuthToken diagnostic
M2: D2 precision note supersession should mention D1 progress bar removal
M3: D1 timer threshold should explicitly reference Color.forUtilization()
M4: Title should be imperative form
M2 (LOW): D1 code sample omits formatTimeRemaining declaration
L2: isRetryable switch not mentioned in affected files
L3: App header 44pt is an estimate without explicit frame constraint
L4: Prior ADRs should be annotated as partially superseded
reviewHistory.note: All iteration 1 findings (3H+4M) verified as resolved

decisions.title: CompactUsageRow layout
decisions.description: 20pt single-line layout replacing card-style UsageRow at all 9 call sites

decisions.title: Int truncation bug fix
decisions.description: Int(value.rounded()) replaces Int(value) for percentage rounding precision

decisions.title: Height constant updates
decisions.description: expandedRowHeight updated from 228pt to ~140pt accounting for DisclosureGroup padding

decisions.title: Keychain migration to SecItemCopyMatching
decisions.description: Migrate from security CLI to SecItemCopyMatching for OAuth token access

agentContributions.adr-architect: Phase 1 scope analysis, revision instruction synthesis, final assessment delivery
agentContributions.tech-analyst: Feasibility assessment, call-site mapping (9 locations), risk analysis (8 risks), recommendation for Option C (compact everywhere)
agentContributions.adr-writer: ADR-003 draft authoring, revision execution after iteration 1 feedback
agentContributions.adr-reviewer-2: Iteration 2 verification review, confirmed all fixes, approved at 92/100

keyConflictsAndResolutions.conflict: Tech analyst flagged RF-A (single-account pixel-identity ambiguity)
keyConflictsAndResolutions.resolution: User explicitly removed pixel-identity constraint, scope expanded to include D4
Reviewer-1 identified discrepancy, corrected to ~140pt accounting for DisclosureGroup padding in revision
